name: clean-code-javascript
description: Clean Code concepts adapted for JavaScript

commits.message: Fix `paintCar` example to include `color` as param
Fix stray hyphen turning into a random bullet
Replace pass-by-reference with mutability, clean up
Add calculation for milliseconds in a day
Fix calling animationModule in ISP bad example
Add an underscore to "Use explanatory variables"
add armenian translation to the list
Change argument name from inner variable name
Added number separator for improve readability
Added source link for bengali translations
Fixing bad code example for over-optimization
Update plain http link to https
remove distracting reference in "testing single concept per test"
Added link to the new spanish translation
remove map method in favor functional programming
fix some typos in the README.md
Refactor flags exmaple to be DRY
use this to access object methods
Remove subsection regarding legal comments in source files
Remove quip about JavaScript and Haskell being like beer types/brands
Mention async functions as part of ES2017 instead of ES7 (ES2016) + switch to "ES<year>/ES<edition>" when mentioning ECMAScript versions.
return true on save method to continue chaining
Add mention of jsinspect for duplicate code detection
fix indentation in a code example
Adjusted the commentthat show the result
Change var and let to const where necessary
use const in rule "Use explanatory variables"
Remove redundant object from Object.assign example
Use constants when variable values do not change
Add missing function call to "no side effects"

issues.title: Made a Fork for good-code-python
Fix: Correct camelCase for getdata() to getData() in Error Handling section
fixing README title
issue
docs: update Object.assign() example to prefer spread operator syntax
docs: fix incorrect example in "Don't ignore rejected promises" section
docs: remove misleading link from "Don't over-optimize" section
Remove misleading link from "Don't over-optimize" section
Fix incorrect example in "Don't ignore rejected promises"
Update Translation

new change

Add examples for pure functions and destructuring defaults
fix:  ReferenceError email is not defined

fix camelCase.
